name: Firemen's Quarters
description:
This is a well lived in room, and from the looks of the empty beer cans,
pizza boxes and the scattered decks of playing cards, it seems like this room
is used for more than just sleeping.  Other discarded objects in the room prove
that this room is frequented by call girls.  The Fire Station is down the fire
pole.

extra_descriptions.description: They seem to be some kind of used contraceptive device.
